rationale: Re-attacked pinned ms-panel.js at 4e8a1f45 by extracting the pre-agent validator/buildCommand block to /tmp and executing 53 payload checks. Shell metacharacters, whitespace, flag-shaped slug/spec/bead_id, and mix family gpt all throw before any agent command can run; flag-shaped values are stopped by buildCommand's leading-dash guard after validateArgs but before command dispatch. buildCommand emits only the four ALLOWED_CLI templates. Built the branch binary to /tmp and confirmed panel create/verify/tally verbs. The exact-set test passes on the real tree and fails on a /tmp copy with an injected non-comment mindspec panel create literal after SHELL_METACHAR_RE, confirming the \x60 escape avoids scanner desync. git grep found no mindspec complete in ms-panel.js. No bypass found.
findings: No injection bypass found: specified shell metacharacter, whitespace, and flag-shaped slug/spec/bead_id payloads are rejected before agent command execution.
validateMix rejects unsupported family gpt at entry before registration or any command construction.
Allowed-CLI exact-set guard catches an injected non-comment mindspec panel create literal after SHELL_METACHAR_RE; ms-panel.js contains no mindspec complete literal.
